privacy.shareVisitedDesc: When on, friends see the places, cities, and countries you've visited — on destination pages (“Visited by…”) and your Travel Atlas. Off keeps your travel history private to you.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.subtitle: Permanently close your account. This cancels any active subscription and signs you out. Trips you organize remain for the other participants, but you'll lose access to them — and you can't undo this yourself.
deleteAccount.warning: This is permanent and can't be undone. When you delete your account:
deleteAccount.bullet3: Trips you organize remain for the other participants, but you'll lose access to them.
deleteAccount.bullet4: You'll be signed out right away.

aiTripBuilderCard.lede: Tell us your budget and what you want to do. We pick the destination, plan every day, and save a draft you can edit before confirming.
aiTripBuilderCard.microcopy: Takes ~30 seconds. The plan is yours to edit.

intro.title: Three ways to start
intro.content: However you like to plan, there's a starting point here. Let's take a quick look — under a minute.

place.title: Search by Place
place.content: Know where you're headed? Pick Search by Place, then type a country or city. We'll open its guide so you can start a trip there.

describe.title: Search by Interest
describe.content: Not tied to one spot? Switch to Search by Interest and describe the vibe — "warm beaches in December," "cheap food cities" — and we'll suggest matching places.

searchbar.title: One search box
searchbar.content: The box adapts to the mode you picked above — place names when searching by place, a free-text prompt when searching by description.

ai.title: Let us plan it for you
ai.content: Totally undecided? Tap Plan my trip for me — we’ll ask a few quick questions, then draft a full itinerary you can tweak. (Pro feature.)

search.blocked: DaTryp.com is a travel planner — try a search like “beach yoga retreat” or “ancient ruins.” <link>Learn more</link>.

bar.countryError: Could not reach the country service. Is the backend running?
bar.placeError: Could not reach the place search. Is the backend running?
bar.recommendError: Could not reach the recommender service{{detail}}. Is the backend running?
bar.noMatches: No matches for “{{query}}”. Try a different vibe.

reviews.empty: No reviews yet — be the first to share your experience.
reviews.thoughtsPlaceholder: What stood out? Where would you stay? Anything to avoid?

tour.welcomeBody: This is the {{kind}} guide — weather, costs, safety, things to do, and more. First, a quick look at the icons up top.
tour.actionsIntro: These icons let you keep track of places:
tour.saveItem: Save — bookmark it to your Saved list to come back to later.
tour.visitedItem: Visited — mark you've been here; it shows up on your travel map.
tour.bucketItem: Bucket list — add it to your someday-travel wishlist.
tour.shareItem: Share — send it via WhatsApp or email, or copy the link.
tour.ctaPlaceBody: Tap Add to itinerary to drop this place straight onto a day in one of your trips — no retyping.
tour.ctaPlanBody: When you're ready, hit Start planning — we'll turn this {{kind}} into a trip with the destination pre-filled so you can jump straight to the itinerary.

email.title: Email this place
email.hint: Separate multiple emails with commas or spaces.
email.emptyError: Enter at least one email address.

hero.title: Plan smarter. Plan more.
hero.subtitle: Free works for casual trips. Pro is for travelers who want deeper recommendations, unlimited saved itineraries, and a bucket list that builds the trip for them. Try Pro free for 30 days — no charge until day 31, cancel anytime.

savedTrips.label: Saved trips
savedTrips.note: Past, present, and future — all in one place.

searchQuality.label: Search quality
searchQuality.note: Richer recommendations, deeper detail for each place.

bucketList.label: Bucket list
bucketList.note: Save the places you dream about and come back when you’re ready.

bucketToTrip.label: Turn a bucket-list goal into a trip
bucketToTrip.note: One click → datryp builds a full itinerary (country, days, activities) you can edit and save.

planForYou.label: Plan a trip for you
planForYou.note: Tell us a budget + a few interests and datryp picks the destination, plans the days, and saves a draft trip for you to edit.

personalizedPicks.label: Personalized picks for you
personalizedPicks.note: Free: Places you might love, tied to your interests and travel style. Pro adds your monthly personalized top pick.

detailPages.label: Enhanced detail pages
detailPages.note: Free: full country / city / place detail pages with cultural-shock heads-up. Pro adds the year-current popularity meter and experience-highlight image strip.

ratings.label: Place ratings & reviews
ratings.note: Google ratings, review counts, and verified street addresses on every place — in suggestions, search, and your itinerary.

bestThisMonth.label: Best places this month
bestThisMonth.note: Six seasonal homepage picks — where the weather, festivals, or natural moments line up right now.

mapper.label: Mapper — your travel history on a world map
mapper.note: See every country you’ve visited shaded on a globe, with pins for every place — a living record of where you’ve been.

unlimitedTrips.body: Free is capped at one — Pro lets you keep every itinerary you build, past and future.

advancedSearch.body: Pro digs deeper and returns 5 places per query with richer detail. Free is a taste; Pro is the full menu.

noDailyLimits.body: Free is 15 smart searches a day. Pro doesn’t count.

bucketList.body: Free keeps the first 10 entries; Pro is unlimited. Tap Create trip on any entry and Pro turns the goal into a planned itinerary, ready to edit and save.

detailPages.body: Pro adds a year-current popularity meter (rising / steady / cooling trend) and an experience-highlight image strip on every country, city, and place page — so you can tell at a glance whether a destination is having a moment.

picks.body: Pro layers a personalized monthly top pick onto the homepage recommendations free already shows you.

mapper.body: Visualize every country and place you’ve visited on an interactive world map — shaded regions, pins, and the satisfying proof of how far you’ve gone.

trial.body: 30-day free trial, card upfront so the rollover is automatic if you love it. Cancel any time in the billing portal — no charge until day 31.

cancel.a: Yes. Open your Account page or the Stripe billing portal, click cancel, and that’s it. If you’re still in your trial, you won’t be charged. If you’re past the trial, you keep Pro until the end of your current billing period.

downgrade.q: What happens to my saved trips if I downgrade?
downgrade.a: Your existing trips stay put — we never delete them. You won’t be able to save new ones beyond the free limit until you upgrade again, but everything you’ve already built is there waiting.

refunds.a: We don’t issue partial refunds for unused time — your subscription stays active until the end of the period you paid for. If something genuinely broken on our side stops you from using Pro, contact us and we’ll make it right.

data.q: Do you train on my data?
data.a: No. Your searches and trips are stored on DaTryp.com for you to use, not handed to anyone else to train on. Each search goes to the recommendation provider just to answer that single query, and nothing is retained on their side beyond standard request logs.

switch.q: Can I switch between monthly and yearly?
switch.a: Yes. From your Account page, click Manage billing, and Stripe lets you change the cadence whenever you want. Switching to yearly is the same price as 2 months free.

planCards.trialNote: 30-day free trial. No charge until day 31 — cancel anytime from your billing portal.

welcome.heroTitle: You’re in. Welcome to DaTryp.com Pro.
welcome.heroSubtitle: Your 30-day free trial has started. No charge until day 31 — cancel anytime from your Account page.

savedTrips.lead: Save as many trips as you like.
savedTrips.body: Past, present, and future — all in one place.

search.body: Searches return 5 places with deeper detail and richer recommendations.

noLimits.body: Search as much as you want.

manage.body: Switch between monthly and yearly, update your card, or cancel from the Account page’s Subscription section.

welcome.fineprint: A receipt for your subscription will be emailed to you by Stripe.

essentialApps.title: Essential apps
essentialApps.intro: The apps locals actually use — worth installing before you go.
essentialApps.homeNote: Heads up — the apps you rely on back home don't always work abroad: some run with limits or are blocked outright, and locals often use different ones. That's what the list below is for.
essentialApps.note: Approximate — app availability and popularity may vary by region. Verify before your trip.

time.label: Local time
time.multi: Capital's zone — the country spans several

deleteDialog.body_other: This will remove the trips from your list. Participants you invited will be notified, and the data is removed from your account.

paywall.modalHeadline: Take your travel history out of a list and onto a beautiful world map.
paywall.modalBody: Travel Atlas shades every country you've visited and pins every place — a living record of your travels. Available on every Pro plan.

homeBase.label: Current place of residence
homeBase.hint: Current place of residence — we only store your city, not your street address. Drives the nearest-airport / train-station suggestion on new trips, the depart-origin on Google Maps directions, and the personalized homepage picks.

empty.heading: You haven't saved anything yet.

empty.hintAfter: on anything you want to come back to.

tripCard.plannedTitle: How filled in the itinerary is
tripCard.confirmDialogBody: Confirming locks the itinerary — you won't be able to add or edit places afterward. Participants will be notified if the bell is on.
tripCard.completeDialogBody: Once completed the trip is read-only — it stays in your list as a record of where you've been. Completing it also:

completeBenefits.atlas: Adds your destinations to your Travel Atlas
completeBenefits.reviews: Unlocks reviews so you can rate where you went

tripCard.resolveStatusError: Couldn't resolve the next trip status. Try again shortly.
tripCard.editDatesHint: Open Edit Trip to change the trip dates.
tripCard.someUnconfirmedNote: Confirming marks them all Confirmed and locks the itinerary — you won't be able to edit afterward. Cancel to review first.

notFound.title: Trip not found
notFound.subtitle: We couldn't find this trip. It may have been deleted, or the link points to a trip that's no longer in your list.

completedBanner.title: Trip completed
completedBanner.subtitle: Locked in as a record of where you've been. Activity edits, deletes, and budget changes are sealed.

cancelledBanner.title: Trip cancelled
cancelledBanner.subtitle: This trip is cancelled. The itinerary stays viewable as a record, but it's no longer active.

markCompleteCta.title: Trip all wrapped up?
markCompleteCta.subtitle: Mark it complete to archive it as a record of where you've been.
markCompleteCta.endedSubtitle: Did you complete this trip? Mark it complete to archive it as a record of where you've been.

aiFill.sub: Let us finish your itinerary with the best activities.
aiFill.subWithPlace: Let us finish your itinerary with the best activities for {{place}}.
aiFill.modalBody: We'll fill your empty days with great, well-rated activities and keep your flight exactly as is. You can edit or remove anything afterward.
aiFill.modalBodyWithPlace: We'll fill your empty days with the best activities for {{place}} and keep your flight exactly as is. You can edit or remove anything afterward.
aiFill.point1: Day-by-day activities across your trip dates
aiFill.point2: Your flight and anything you've added stay put
aiFill.point3: Fully editable — tweak or remove anything
aiFill.buildingNote: This can take up to a minute — hang tight.
aiFill.error: We couldn't plan your itinerary. Please try again.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.hint: Send the trip summary + link to a participant or group chat.

email.title: Email
email.hint: Opens your mail app with the trip summary + link.

copyLink.title: Copy link
copyLink.hint: Paste it anywhere — Messages, Slack, anywhere.

pdf.title: Download PDF
pdf.hint: Branded two-page report — itinerary + expense summary.

print.title: Print
print.hint: Opens your browser's print preview — save as PDF or send to a printer.

excel.title: Download Excel
excel.hint: Day-by-day .xlsx with activities, times, and budget.

confirm.cancelBody: The trip moves to Cancelled status. Participants will see it as cancelled but the itinerary stays viewable. This can be reversed later by an organizer.
confirm.deleteBody: This permanently removes the trip and all its activities. Participants will no longer see it in their list. This cannot be undone.

reminders.tripStartsToday: {{name}} starts today — have a great trip!

toasts.tripConfirmed: Yay! Your trip is confirmed and ready to go!
toasts.emailFailed: Couldn't email the itinerary — you can still share it from the ⋮ menu.

errors.stillSaving: Still saving the previous change. Try again in a moment.
errors.resolveCancelled: Couldn't resolve the Cancelled status. Try again shortly.

budget.empty: Set a budget on the trip details to track spending.

tight.label: Tight
tight.why: Your budget is {{pct}}% under — you may need to economize on lodging or dining.

comfortable.label: Comfortable
comfortable.why: You have {{pct}}% cushion — room for upgrades or memorable splurges.

onTarget.label: On target
onTarget.why: Your budget lines up with typical spend for this trip.

planning.title: Trip in planning
planning.sub: Your itinerary is fully editable — add, edit, or remove activities and changes save as you go.
planning.readonlySub: The organizer is still arranging activities. Check back soon.

review.title: Trip review
review.scoreFailed: Couldn't score the trip — try again.
review.quotaLast: That was your last review today — resets at UTC midnight.

error.generic: Couldn't run the checkup. Try again in a moment.
error.notPlanning: Trip checkup is only available while the trip is in Planning.
error.quota: You've used today's trip reviews. Resets at UTC midnight.
error.pro: Trip Checkup is a Pro feature. Upgrade to score your trip.

completion.title: Trip recap
completion.sub: A snapshot of where you went and what you did.

note.placeholder: How did the trip go? Anything to remember for next time…

atlas.title: Added to your Travel Atlas
atlas.subtitle: You can now leave reviews and revisit your travel history anytime.

suggestions.loading: Finding ideas that fit your trip…
suggestions.quotaLast: That was your last run today — resets at UTC midnight.

error.generic: Couldn't fetch suggestions. Try again in a moment.
error.notPlanning: This trip is no longer in Planning. Move it back to Planning to get new ideas.
error.quota: You've used today's lightbulb runs. Resets at UTC midnight.
error.pro: Lightbulb suggestions are a Pro feature. Upgrade to unlock.

picker.title: Add to which day?
picker.sub: Pick a day to drop {{name}} onto.

notifPrefs.title: Notifications for this trip
notifPrefs.intro: Choose how you're notified about this trip. This overrides your account notification settings.

options.noneHint: Silence email + SMS for this trip (in-app alerts still show).
options.noneHintEmailOnly: Silence email for this trip (in-app alerts still show).

offline.savedAria: Saved offline. Tap to remove the offline copy.
offline.tapAgainTitle: Tap again to remove the offline copy

saved.title: Your trip is saved
saved.content: Here's the read-only view of your trip. A few things to know before you head out — let's walk through them in under a minute.

lifecycle.title: Trip lifecycle
lifecycle.content: A trip moves through Planning → Confirmed → Completed. Click Confirm Trip when bookings are locked. After that, activities can be ticked off one by one.

details.title: Trip details & editing
details.content: Tap Trip details to expand the overview — dates, destination, budget, and who's going. While the trip is in Planning the organizer can edit any of it (and the day list) right here; changes save as you go.

focus.title: Focus mode
focus.content: Tap Focus to hide every overview card — even the app's header and nav — so the page is just your dates and activities. A floating Show pill brings the chrome back. Great for reading the itinerary on the go.

night.title: Night view
night.content: Tap Night for a dark theme scoped to the itinerary — easier on the eyes on a plane or in a dim hotel room. It resets to day view when you leave the page.

textOnly.title: Text-only view
textOnly.content: Tap Text only to hide every activity's photo for a dense, scannable list. Handy on a slow connection or when you just want the plan, not the pictures.

offline.title: Take it offline
offline.content: Once a trip is Confirmed, tap Offline to save a copy to this device. It opens with no signal — perfect for reading your itinerary abroad without data. On mobile this lives in the ⋮ menu.

share.title: Share & download PDF
share.content: Tap Share to send the trip on WhatsApp or email, copy the link, or Download PDF — a branded report with the itinerary and expense summary. You can also grab an Excel sheet or Print a paper copy.

quietEdits.title: Quiet edits
quietEdits.content: Untick the bell to skip the email + in-app notification fan-out when you save a tiny edit. The trip still saves; the rest of the group just isn't pinged.

timeline.title: Day-by-day timeline
timeline.content: Every day in your trip range has its own row. Activities are sorted by start time. Past activities dim once their end time passes. Look for a green stripe along the top — that marks the activity happening right now and grows as time elapses.

activityStatus.title: Per-activity status
activityStatus.content: Once the trip is Confirmed, each activity gets a checkmark to mark it Completed. Past-due activities auto-tick if you don't get to them — you can always toggle them back. Tap a place name to open its full detail in a new tab.

intro.title: Plan your first trip
intro.content: We'll ask one quick thing per screen and you tap Next to move on. Hit Take the tour again on any screen if you want a refresher.

singleOrMulti.title: Single or multi-destination?
singleOrMulti.content: Single for one country, one window of dates. Multi for hopping across several. Switch later if your plans change.

aiPlan.title: Or let us plan it for you
aiPlan.content: Short on time? Tap Let us plan it for you and our AI builds a full itinerary for your destination. It's a Pro feature — and you can tweak everything afterward.

tapNext.title: Tap Next
tapNext.content: Once you've picked, tap Next to keep going.

where.title: Where are you going?
where.content: Start typing a country and pick from the suggestions. The trip name auto-fills — you can rename anytime.

when.title: When are you going?
when.content: Set your start and end dates. We'll work out the night count and pre-build an empty itinerary day for each date in the range.

budget.title: What's your budget?
budget.content: A rough total works — you'll split it per activity later. Use 0 if you'd rather not track spend at all.

canEdit.title: Organizers can edit
canEdit.content: You're added automatically. Add co-organizers if someone else should be able to change the trip — dates, places, budget, etc.

comeAlong.title: Participants come along
comeAlong.content: Add the people you're traveling with. They can be tagged on activities and you can split budgets between them later in the Itinerary step. Going solo? Just hit Next.

build.title: Build your itinerary
build.content: Each day in your trip range becomes a slot you can fill with places, flights, hotel check-ins, or just notes. Don't try to fill everything — empty days are fine too.

oneRow.title: One row per day
oneRow.content: Each date in your trip gets its own row. Activities added to a day are auto-sorted by start time so the day reads top-to-bottom in chronological order.

addActivity.title: Add an activity
addActivity.content: Tap Add to insert a place, restaurant, flight, hotel check-in, or a free-form note. You can edit, reorder, or delete any activity later. Cancelling the form discards your changes — nothing is saved until you hit Finish.

save.title: Save your trip
save.content: When you're ready, click Finish. We'll save the trip and notify any participants you added on step 2. The trip page has its own quick tour covering PDF download, offline, night view, and marking activities Completed.

activity.dropHint: Drop a place here, or add one below.
activity.openDetailsTitle: Open {{name}} details in a new tab

delete.title: Delete this activity
delete.confirm: You are about to delete {{name}}. Are you sure?

deleteDestination.title: Delete this destination
deleteDestination.body: You are about to delete {{country}}. Are you sure? This can't be undone.

status.pastLockedTitle: This activity has already passed and is locked
status.lockedAria: {{name}} is locked — its time has passed

budget.title: Travel Budget
budget.setPayerAria: Set who is paying for this

complete.title: Your trip is all set!
complete.subtitle: Pack your bags — we've saved every detail.

notify.intro: We'll alert the people you choose about this activity across in-app, email and text — based on each person's notification settings.
notify.introNamed: We'll alert the people you choose about {{name}} across in-app, email and text — based on each person's notification settings.
notify.noOthers: No other participants to notify yet.
notify.notePlaceholder: e.g. Meet at the lobby 15 min early

markPaid.title: Mark as paid
markPaid.subhead: Record who paid and the date so the trip stays settled.
markPaid.subheadEdit: Update who covered this expense and when.
markPaid.splitToggle: Split this payment among multiple people
markPaid.splitHint: Tick each participant once they've paid their share. The activity shows as paid when at least one row is checked.
markPaid.splitEmpty: Add participants below to split this payment.

review.starsAriaWithCount_other: {{rating}} out of 5 from {{count}} reviews — open ratings & reviews

method.sub: Choose a way to fill in the details.

suggestions.label: Suggestions
suggestions.sub: Pick from ideas for your destination.

smart.label: Smart search

review.headline: Ready to add?
review.sub: Quick check — use Back to tweak anything.

confirm.heading: Confirm your destination
confirm.pickDestination: Pick your destination city or country.

flightSearch.noFlights: No flights found — try a different time of day, clear the To-airport or airline filter, or switch to Custom to enter it by hand.

hero.title: Tell us what you love. We’ll find the best matches.
hero.sub: Answer a few quick questions and we’ll suggest personalized destinations — pick one and we’ll build the full itinerary.
hero.optionsTitle: Pick the one that calls to you.
hero.optionsSub: Each option is a real trip we can build for you. Pick one and we’ll generate the full day-by-day plan.

budget.question: Roughly, how much do you want to spend?
budget.hint: Per traveler, in USD. Covers lodging, food, transit, and activities (international flights aren’t included).
budget.errorMin: Set a budget of at least {{min}}.

interests.question: What do you want to do?
interests.hint: Pick 3–8 that sound fun — these drive what destinations show up. Choose anything that appeals to you.
interests.placeholder: Type and press Enter (e.g. fishing, beach, sunset)
interests.errorEmpty: Add at least one interest (try "beach" or "hiking").

destination.question: Anywhere in mind?
destination.hint: Optional — name a country or region to focus on, or leave it blank and we’ll suggest destinations from your interests.
destination.placeholder: e.g. Japan, anywhere in SE Asia, the Mediterranean
destination.orQuickPick: Or start from a quick pick

duration.question: How long should the trip be?
duration.hint: Optional — if you skip this we’ll pick a length that fits the budget.

party.question: How many people are going?
party.hint: We use this to size lodging suggestions and split the budget per-person.

options.bestFit: We think this is the best fit
options.surprise: Not sure? We’ll pick the best fit for you

options.title: Finding your destination matches
options.subtitle: Hold tight — we’re matching your preferences to the right spots.

build.title: Crafting your trip
build.subtitle: Hold tight — we’re shaping this into a real itinerary.

enrich.title: Writing a title for each dream…

errors.optionsFailed: Could not find options right now. Try again.
errors.buildFailed: Could not build that trip right now. Try again.

bucketList.subtitle: Your bucket list is the wishlist of things you want to experience while traveling — a concert, a stadium, a hike, a meal, a festival. Keep them here, and when you're ready, turn any goal into a full trip in one tap.

cap.full: You've filled all {{limit}} free slots — <upgrade>upgrade to Pro</upgrade> for unlimited entries.

paths.regionAria: Two ways to start a trip

bucket.eyebrow: Already have a dream in mind?
bucket.title: Add it to your bucket list

step1.title: 1. Capture the dream
step1.body: Jot down anything you want to experience — a stadium match, a hike, a tasting menu, a festival. Phrase it like you'd tell a friend.

step2.title: 2. We build the trip
step2.body: Tap Build trip on any goal. We pick the destination, plan days and activities around it, and save it as a draft Planning trip.

step3.title: 3. Tweak & go
step3.body: Review the draft, swap activities, invite friends, then confirm when you're ready. Nothing is locked in until you say so.

add.placeholder: e.g. Watch an FC Barcelona game at Camp Nou
add.error: Could not add that one — try again.

empty.title: Your bucket list is empty.
empty.hint: Add a goal above — phrase it like you would tell a friend ("watch the Barcelona game", "see the Northern Lights").

bucketList.generateError: Sorry, we couldn't build your trip right now. Please try again in a moment.

card.proHint: Pro polishes goals into titled cards
card.buildLockedAria: Pro only — upgrade to create a trip from "{{text}}"

party.question: How many people are going?
party.hint: Sizes lodging suggestions and splits the budget per person.

duration.question: How long should the trip be?
duration.hint: Pick a length, or let us decide based on the budget + activity mix.

cap.title: Bucket list full
cap.headline: You've added {{count}} of {{cap}} bucket-list entries on the free plan.
cap.body: DaTryp.com Pro removes the limit so you can keep dreaming. Pro also unlocks "Create trip" — turn any bucket-list goal into a real itinerary.

generate.title: Pro feature
generate.headline: Turning a bucket-list goal into a real trip is a Pro feature.
generate.body: DaTryp.com Pro builds an itinerary from any of your bucket-list entries — picking a country, planning days, suggesting activities — saved as a draft trip ready for you to tweak.

createTrip.tourHelp: Show me how to plan a trip

mode.title: What kind of trip?
mode.subtitle: Pick how you're traveling — you can switch later.

single.title: One destination
single.subtitle: One country, one set of dates.

multiple.title: Multiple destinations
multiple.subtitle: Hop across countries on one itinerary.

ai.title: Let us plan it for you
ai.titleWithPlace: Let us plan your trip to {{place}} for you
ai.subtitle: We'll do our best to plan the best trip.

destination.title: Where are you going?
destination.subtitle: Pick your destination country — we'll name the trip after it.
destination.label: Destination

dates.title: When are you going?
dates.subtitle: Set your start and end dates — we'll build an empty day for each date in the range.
dates.invalidRange: End date can't be before the start date.

budget.title: What's your budget?
budget.subtitle: A ballpark total is fine — you can split it per activity later.
budget.label: Total budget
budget.hint: Use 0 if you'd rather not track spend at all.

organizers.title: Who's organizing?
organizers.subtitle: Organizers can edit the trip — dates, places, budget. You're added automatically; add a co-organizer if someone else can make changes.
organizers.label: Organizers

participants.title: Who's coming along?
participants.subtitle: Add the people you're traveling with — they can split budgets with you. You're added by default; remove yourself if you're planning for someone else.

participantsEdit.title: Who's coming along?
participantsEdit.subtitle: Add the friends you're traveling with — they'll see the trip in their list and can split budgets with you. Going solo? Just hit Next.
participantsEdit.label: Participants

aiPlan.title: Can't decide? Let us plan it for you
aiPlan.sub: We'll fill your itinerary with the best activities — your flight stays put.
aiPlan.subWithPlace: We'll fill your itinerary with the best activities for {{place}} — your flight stays put.

invalid.endBeforeStart: End date can't be before the start date.

error.loginToSave: Please log in to save your trip.
error.resolveTripType: Could not resolve trip type. Try again in a moment.
error.resolveTripTypeSeed: Could not resolve trip type. Lookup tables may not be seeded — try again in a moment.
error.resolveCancelledStatus: Couldn't resolve the Cancelled status. Try again shortly.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel this trip?
cancelDialog.body: The trip moves to Cancelled status. Participants will see it as cancelled but the itinerary stays viewable. This can be reversed later by an organizer.

deleteDialog.title: Delete this trip?
deleteDialog.body: This permanently removes the trip and all its activities. Participants will no longer see it in their list. This cannot be undone.

friends.title: Friends
friends.loggedOut: Log in to manage your friends.

requests.title: Friend requests
requests.subtitle: Accept to connect and start planning trips together.

yourFriends.title: Your friends
yourFriends.subtitle: Friends can be added to trips to plan itineraries together and share travel plans.
yourFriends.empty: No friends yet. Invite one to get started.

sent.title: Sent requests
sent.subtitle: Waiting for them to accept. Resend the email if they didn’t see it.

removeDialog.title: Remove {{name}}?
removeDialog.body: They’ll be removed from your friends list and won’t see your trips unless you’re both organizers on one. To reconnect, either of you will need to send a fresh friend request.

invite.title: Invite a friend
invite.helper: Enter an email address. If they're already on DaTryp we'll send a friend request — otherwise we'll send an invitation to join.

hero.lede: We love travel. DaTryp was born from the idea of having a very useful tool to make life easier — a place to record your memories and create your perfect trip.

plainLanguage.title: Travel that gets you
plainLanguage.body: Describe the trip in plain language — "two weeks in Japan, mostly food" — and let the recommender propose destinations and activities.

itineraries.title: Itineraries that flow
itineraries.body: Drag, drop, and reorder days. Single-destination or multi-city, the tool keeps the timeline tidy and your budget in view.

collaboration.title: Plan with friends
collaboration.body: Invite organizers and participants, split budgets per activity, and keep everyone in sync with in-app + email notifications.

forever.title: Yours forever
forever.body: Completed trips stay in your list as a record of where you've been. Saved places and bucket lists travel with you.

story.heading: Our story
story.body1: DaTryp started with a frustration most travelers know: trip planning lives across a dozen tabs, group chats, and half-finished spreadsheets. We wanted one calm place — one that asks the right questions, suggests good answers, and gets out of the way once the trip is set.
story.body2: We're a small team that loves maps, layovers, and the moment a tentative plan becomes a real ticket. We build DaTryp for travelers like us — and for the millions of trips that almost happen, but never quite do.

next.heading: What's next
next.body: Smarter suggestions, deeper collaboration, better mobile, and proper offline support. The roadmap is shaped by the people using the product — if there's something you'd love to see, the <contactLink>contact page</contactLink> is the fastest way to tell us.

cta.title: Ready to make a trip possible?

hero.title: We're here to help.
hero.lede: Drop us a line and the team will get back to you within one or two business days. You can also email <emailLink>{{email}}</emailLink> directly.

tips.humanInbox: We reply from a real human inbox at {{email}}.
tips.noPasswords: Don't share passwords or payment details — we'll never ask for them.
tips.screenshot: A screenshot or steps to reproduce a bug helps us ship a fix faster.

success.title: Message sent — thank you!
success.body: We've routed it to {{email}}. Expect a reply at {{replyTo}} within one or two business days.

form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us what's up. Steps to reproduce, ideas, anything goes.

account.title: Help with your account
account.body: Trouble signing in, paying, or syncing trips? We'll get you back on the road.

ideas.title: Feature ideas
ideas.body: Something you wish DaTryp.com did? We read every suggestion and ship the good ones.

bugs.title: Bugs & feedback
bugs.body: Caught something broken or just off? Let us know what happened and what you expected.

replyTime.q: How long until I get a reply?
replyTime.a: We aim for one or two business days. Account / billing issues get prioritized — if you write billing in the subject, we route it straight to that queue.

freeVsPro.a: The core app — searching, viewing places, marking visited, planning one trip at a time — is free. Pro unlocks AI-built trips, your full visited-places map, unlimited saved trips, and the monthly best-place picks. See <membershipLink>Membership</membershipLink> for the current pricing.

cancel.q: How do I cancel my Pro subscription?
cancel.a: Open the <accountLink>Account</accountLink> page and look for the Subscription card. The “Manage subscription” button takes you to Stripe's Customer Portal where you can cancel, update payment, or change plans. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period — no proration, but you keep Pro features until then.

delete.q: How do I delete my account?
delete.a: Account → scroll to the bottom → Delete account. Deletion removes your profile, trips, bookmarks, and visited-places lists. Anonymized usage telemetry may be retained for up to 30 days for security/audit, then purged.

dataSharing.q: What data do you share with third parties?
dataSharing.a: We don't sell or share your personal data with marketers. Names + emails go to SendGrid for transactional email, Stripe for payments, and our AI technology / Unsplash partners for the trip-builder and photo lookups (as request bodies, not for training). Full breakdown lives on the <privacyLink>Privacy</privacyLink> page.

about.heading: What DaTryp.com is
about.body: DaTryp.com is a travel-planning tool. It helps you discover destinations, build itineraries, save the places you want to visit, and share trips with friends. Some features use AI to suggest places and activities based on what you type.

aiSearch.heading: Using AI search
aiSearch.body1: Our AI search is built to answer questions about trips, destinations, places, and activities. Searches that aren't about travel — for example, requests involving weapons, drugs, sexual content, or self-harm — may not return results. This isn't a punishment; it just isn't what DaTryp.com is for. Try a different search.
aiSearch.body2: If you think a travel-related search was blocked by mistake, rephrase it (for example, “Amsterdam coffee culture” instead of a more loaded keyword) and try again.

accuracy.heading: Accuracy of the information we show
accuracy.body1: Much of what you see on DaTryp.com — destination guides, recommendations, essential-app lists, budgets, ratings, and safety or visa notes — is generated automatically (including by AI) or drawn from third-party sources. It may be inaccurate, incomplete, or out of date, and some of it is AI-generated and has not been individually verified by us. It is provided for general information only and is not professional, financial, legal, immigration, medical, or safety advice.
accuracy.body2: Always confirm important details with an official source before you act on them — especially payment and banking apps, visa and entry requirements, and health and safety information. DaTryp.com is not responsible for any loss or harm resulting from reliance on this content.

account.heading: Your account
account.body: You must be at least 13 years old to use DaTryp.com. You're responsible for keeping your sign-in details safe and for the activity that happens under your account.

content.heading: Content you create
content.body: Trips, reviews, and notes you write stay yours. By posting them on DaTryp.com, you let us display them inside the product (for example, in your itinerary or in places you've marked as visited). Don't post content that's illegal, hateful, or that you don't have the right to share.

availability.heading: Service availability
availability.body: DaTryp.com is offered as-is. We try hard to keep things working, but we can't guarantee the service will be uninterrupted, or that the recommendations are perfectly accurate. Confirm important details (visas, opening hours, prices, safety advisories) with an official source before you travel.

changes.heading: Changes
changes.body: We may update these terms as the product evolves. When we do, we'll change the “Last updated” date at the top of this page. Continuing to use DaTryp.com after a change means you're fine with the updated terms.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body: Questions or feedback? Reach us through the contact link in the footer.

short.heading: The short version
short.body: DaTryp.com keeps the data we need to run the product and nothing else. We don't sell your information. The sections below spell out what we collect, how we use it, and the choices you have.

collect.heading: What we collect
collect.account: Account details you give us when you sign up: name, email, password (stored as a one-way hash), and optionally phone number, birth year, gender, country of birth, and travel interests. If you sign in with Google, we receive your name, email, and Google profile ID — never your Google password.
collect.companions: Optional travel-companion preferences you can set on the Account page: whether you usually travel solo, as a couple, with friends, or as a family with kids. If you indicate “family with kids,” you may also pick the age ranges of your kids (e.g. “3–5”, “6–9”). We deliberately collect only coarse age ranges — never exact ages, names, dates of birth, or marital status. These fields are opt-in, default empty, and editable or clearable at any time. We use them to bias trip recommendations (e.g. Disney + toddler-friendly picks for families with young kids; couple-style activities when you select “couple”).
collect.travel: Travel data you create inside DaTryp.com: trips, itineraries, activities, saved places, visited places, bucket list entries, reviews, and search history.
collect.social: Social data tied to the people you plan with: friend requests, accepted friendships, and the participants on shared trips.
collect.billing: Billing data if you subscribe to Pro: handled by Stripe. We store your Stripe customer ID and subscription status — we never see or store your card number.
collect.technical: Technical data we receive automatically: basic request logs, browser/device info, and (if you opt in) a push-notification subscription.
collect.analytics: Product analytics from your use of the site: which pages you visit, which features you click on, and a stable per-browser identifier so we can tell one user's session apart from another. When you sign in, we associate this identifier with your DaTryp.com account so we can answer questions like “does the AI trip builder convert better than the manual flow?” We do not record video of your sessions, and form inputs marked sensitive (phone number, password, payment fields) are masked in transit. We don't use this data for advertising.

use.heading: How we use it
use.body: To run the product — sign you in, save your itineraries, recommend places, show your friends, send notifications you've enabled, and process payments. We also use aggregated, non-identifying signals (like how many people searched a city this month) to improve recommendations.

ai.heading: AI personalization & what we send to our AI provider
ai.body1: Some AI features (AI search, AI itinerary suggestions, bucket-list trip generation) only send the text of your query — nothing from your profile travels with it.
ai.body2: A few personalized features send a small set of profile fields to our AI technology partner so the recommendation can match your situation:

items.places: Places you might love sends your chosen interests, traveler styles, and dream destinations (labels only, not your name or email).
items.holiday: Upcoming holiday sends the name of your country of birth so the holiday picks match what you celebrate.
items.monthly: Your monthly top pick (Pro) sends your approximate age (derived from your birth year), your country of birth, your gender (if you chose to share one), and your interests/traveler styles. We never send your name, email, friends list, payment info, or any other directly identifying field.
items.trips: Trip recommendations (when you ask the AI for trip ideas) may also send the opt-in travel-companion slugs and kids-age ranges you set on the Account page — so a Disney query knows whether to surface toddler-friendly attractions and a couples retreat knows to skip the kid-club. Like everything else in this list, these fields are slugs / coarse ranges only, never names or exact ages.

ai.body3: Our AI technology processes these inputs only to generate that single response; per the provider's API terms, the data is not used to train models. You can clear or change any of these fields any time from the Account page — doing so wipes our cached recommendation and regenerates it next time you visit.

processors.heading: Who else handles your data
processors.body1: A small set of trusted services help us run DaTryp.com:

items.ai: AI technology partners — generate AI search and itinerary recommendations from your query text.
items.google: Google — handles “Sign in with Google” if you use it.
items.aws: Amazon Web Services — hosts our backend, database, and image CDN.
items.unsplash: Unsplash — provides destination photos. Your browser fetches images directly from Unsplash's CDN, which means they see your IP address.
items.posthog: PostHog — collects the product analytics events described above (pageviews, clicks, and a per-browser identifier). PostHog sees your IP address and approximate location at the city level for the purpose of analytics; per their data processing terms, they don't use your data for any purpose other than serving us. We send only feature-usage events and an opaque user id; we never send sensitive fields like phone, password, or payment info.

processors.body2: We don't sell your data, and we don't share it with advertisers.

visibility.heading: What other users can see
visibility.body: Your name and profile show up to people you add as friends and to participants on trips you share with them. Trips, activities, and notes inside a shared itinerary are visible to everyone on that trip. Your visited places, bucket list, and saved places are private to you by default. You can let friends see where you've travelled by turning on Share visited places with friends under Account › Privacy; until you do, your travel history stays private to you.

choices.heading: Your choices
choices.body1: You can update your profile and preferences from Account. You can delete a trip, a saved place, a review, or any piece of content from inside the product. To delete your entire account, contact us through the link in the footer — we'll remove your personal data within 30 days, except for anything we're required to keep for legal or billing reasons.
choices.body2: You can opt out of non-essential emails from your account settings, and you can disable push notifications from your browser at any time.

cookies.heading: Cookies and similar tech
cookies.body: We use a small number of cookies and local storage entries to keep you signed in and to remember your preferences. We don't use third-party advertising or cross-site tracking cookies.

security.heading: Security
security.body: We use HTTPS everywhere, hash passwords with bcrypt, and restrict who on our side can see user data. No system is perfect — if you spot a security issue, please reach us through the contact link in the footer.

children.heading: Children
children.body: DaTryp.com isn't intended for children under 13. If we learn we've collected data from a child under 13, we'll delete it.

changes.heading: Changes
changes.body: We may update this policy as the product evolves. When we do, we'll change the “Last updated” date at the top of this page. If the change is significant, we'll also let you know in-product or by email.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.body: Questions, requests, or want a copy of your data? Reach us through the contact link in the footer.
